Dashboard Archive: 2026-03-03 Home
About This Dashboard
What It Does
Long-term momentum ranker scoring 700+ tickers on returns from 1 month to 10 years, with relative performance vs SPY over 1y/5y/10y. Same scoring engine as the short-term ranker but optimized for longer investment horizons and secular trends.
Today's Reading
# Market Analysis: momentum-ranker-long BVN ranks #1 today with a score of 94.1, driven by exceptional long-term performance of 688.72% over 10 years and outperforming SPY by 435.41% over the same period. The stock shows consistent momentum acceleration across timeframes, with each ratio threshold passing (4 of 4), and all major moving averages in bullish alignment. AGI appears as a second major candidate with even more extreme returns—1207.8% over 10 years—though its relative SPY outperformance of 954.48% over 10 years suggests it may be a higher-volatility secular winner. Both stocks exhibit "clean" momentum signals with strong buy flags, but BVN's tighter correlation to gold (IAU at 0.711) indicates it may be a precious metals play, while AGI's broader sector exposure and massive 5-year ratio jump (4.39x) points to a different secular trend entirely. The key distinction is that BVN is consolidating proven strength with normal volatility, while AGI represents more explosive growth with potential concentration risk.
